content:
我相信不少玩家會有興趣閱讀開發團隊分享的內容，例如：

• 世界觀和哲學
• 角色設計和創作理念
• 劇情和美術的開發秘談
• 廢案和早期設定稿
• 官方四格漫畫
• 甚至是彌薩格大學相關的學術論文或研究資料

如果能有一個地方讓喜歡這些內容的玩家進一步支持開發團隊，我想應該會有不少人願意加入。
（請給我們一個捐款給彌薩格大學孩子們的機會 😭 🙏）

content:
I'm sure that Morimens is designed with mobile as a priority, and please please take this all with the following disclaimer:  I'm genuinely not complaining, just airing out a few concerns I have and a couple of ideas to make the game absolutely flawless as a PC port.

Now that this game has absorbed my entire week, I REALLY want it to succeed. My problems all come down to how clunky it feels to use keybinds in this otherwise amazing game...
Here are a few issues / suggestions I have:

**Tabbing out of Menus**
To leave a menu in combat, I need to press Esc. It's not an issue, but it would be far more intuitive if, alongside that, I could close said menu by simply pressing the button that led to that menu in the first place.
*where this applies: viewing draw/discard, posse, exalt info menus*

**Card Switching**
Panning to each card, left to right, is clunky due to the delay between switching. Furthermore, once you view cards using buttons, you cannot exit viewing that card (as far as I can tell, using Esc makes the card invisible in hand entirely until clicked).

**Story / Visual Novel QoL**
1. There are no keybinds for log, auto, and hide textbox. I'd also LOVE LOVE it if the ability to use the scroll wheel was added, as it is my preferred way of advancing dialogue. 
*scroll up to bring up the log, down to advance the text*

2. Additionally, implementing a keybind (possibly right click) to hide the text would justify a larger textbox. Waiting for the scrolling animation for text that barely fits honestly makes me shudder in discomfort. I do understand however, that the ENG translation is in beta, so I don't let it bother me too much.

3. Voice replay function in the message log would be absolutely elite if implemented.
thread_title: Buttons / Binds QoL

Oh wow '24' got buff *looking inside* Only chaos start playing, and... She die, yes, go back to corner!
Your place near pandia! You don't deserve life! 

Ok. Let's be serious, 24 need rework. IT'S NOT STANDARD UNIT when you say "Ok maybe she need AA to be good but it's ok, i can pull for her. No, SHE LIMITED UNIT! HELLO!! I can't spend all resources to make her "Playeble" with AA

I don't asking about buff or making new card effects, no, she don't work like dps also she don't work like support

Change how she work with realms

Chaos: You kill her, great work
Blue: Nothing changes, still niche
Caro: Nobody want her
Ultra: still niche for whale daff. In all scenarios she not off meta unit, no, she's not unit, filler option nothing more.

What i suggest
Chaos: Change formala back or buff scaling. Monochaos teams harder to pilot, so please give something more then nothing 

Blue: Swap maniac form with ultra. Now she scaling wt tentacle dmg and counter trigger. Caecus meta counter dps, give him good options to play and back blue to meta

Caro: White form is good but. 1. Why she cant devour?(Yea yea she chaos unit but all this embrio for who?) 2. Low dmg, big bleed, flat dmg on 3 cost...? Why? I mean why she inflict bleed from exalt and nothig more? Give her bleed on all dmg or trigger or save half bleed or something. Bleed unit who doesn't interact with bleed

Ultra: Swap maniac form with blue. It's give more options and better units

content:
**UID: 100748055**

Hi, I'm pretty certain that when I logged in today I had ~52000 Silver on my account, then I decided to spend 17000 Silver on Castor's banner (which I was able to check looking at the banner history). 

After that, I purchased the 'Dreamy Rendezvous' package and claimed the currently available rewards which should include 10000 Silver, but after doing that I only had ~40000 Silver on my account instead of the expected(?) ~45000 (52-17+10). It seems as if only 5000 of the total Silver added for some reason, but it's visually shown as having been claimed.

If it's not too much trouble, I would really be grateful for seeing or just getting a quick double-check from a member of staff on the recent Silver increases and decreases on my account to know if this was the case or not. <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> Thank you 多谢 <:hug:1356083899553288382>
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Possibly given less Silver than displayed when claiming 'Dreamy Rendezvous'

thread_title: 相位bug?

content:
It seems that characters with Strength (STR) multipliers, such as Daffodil, Doresain, and Goliath, perform relatively worse compared to other characters. It appears that the increase in monster HP has caused issues with the Strength buff itself. What are your thoughts on this?

Since adjusting the Strength stat buff itself improves the performance of other characters, we believe it is necessary to implement measures such as granting additional abilities when specific characters reach certain Strength levels or simply increasing the multiplier.

We sincerely want to hear the opinions of both the players and the development team.
